steps.title: Connect sculpture to art history
steps.content: The goal is to connect Save Me to neon in art, not to advertising history or production methods. The relevant note says neon signs became popular with artists in the 1960s and remain popular today, so the sentence should place Steele's sculpture in that artistic lineage.

steps.title: Reject off-task history
steps.content: Choice A shifts toward advertising and handmade production. Choice C omits Steele and Save Me. Choice D contradicts the note by saying neon's artistic popularity has declined, even though the notes say it continues today. The answer is B.
